title: Is there an automation to change status if text is entered into a particular column?
excerpt:
Hi there, 
I am relatively new to Monday and automations. As the title says, is there a way to automate a status change of an item if any text is entered into the text column for that particular item? 
Thanks, 
Blake

posts.author: Blaker88 (Blake Rothfield)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there,

I am relatively new to Monday and automations. As the title says, is there a way to automate a status change of an item if any text is entered into the text column for that particular item?

Thanks,

Blake

posts.author: MsquareAutomation (Msquare Automation Solutions)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi@Blaker88 ,
Yes, you can automate a status change in Monday.com when text is entered into a specific text column for an item.
Here’s how you can set up an automation to change the status of an item when text is entered into a text column:

posts.author: mikerose110 (Mike Rose)
posts.cookedHtml: Is this “When Text Changes” Automation still available? if not, what are the alternatives?

posts.author: shannon-cxmonday (Shannon Thao)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Mike! Welcome to the monday Community! If you are looking to trigger an automation based on change made to a Text Column, I’d recommend using the “When column changes,” trigger action. This is the same trigger action showcased in the response above! In the “column” field, you’ll select your Text Column.

However, please note that this automation will also trigger if you completely delete all of the text in the Text Column. Any change to the Text Column cell will trigger the automation.

posts.author: mikerose110 (Mike Rose)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank you! That first part is clear, however if I want it to be contingent on specific text, I dont see that as an option like I remember it being in 2022. The only option is if a number meetings a condition, or if a dropdown, but since this will be imported from zapier Im not sure a drop down column is usable.
